name: Zilu, Jia Qiu and Zigong - The heart.
description:
No organization moves quite like the Mao Branch.

Those who meet the eyes of the Branch’s top enforcers rarely live to recall the tale, or hardly notice that under their gaze, they are already dead.

Luckily, you might be one of the few exceptions to that.

"OH MY GOD THEY'RE SO GOD! DAMN! COOL!" - TFS Vegeta
creator: true_actual_villain
